mapper.sql: project_id, project_no, tenant_id, project_name, workflow_type, scope_type, building_id, unit_name, fund_source, governance_path, status, active_plan_id, version, created_by_account_id, created_by_user_id, create_time, update_time

plan_id, project_id, tenant_id, version_no, problem_cause, implementation_scope, budget_total, fund_source, allocation_rule_type, allocation_rule_description, supplier_selection_method, supplier_selection_reason, construction_management_requirements, evidence_requirements_json::TEXT AS evidence_requirements_json, safety_requirements, acceptance_method, required_acceptance_roles_json::TEXT AS required_acceptance_roles_json, affected_owner_scope_description, minimum_affected_owner_acceptors, affected_owner_pass_rule, affected_owner_approval_ratio, settlement_method, planned_start_date, planned_completion_date, warranty_days, governance_path, price_review_required, payment_milestones_json::TEXT AS payment_milestones_json, status, snapshot_hash, created_by_account_id, created_by_user_id, locked_by_user_id, create_time, locked_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_repair_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_plan_version ( project_id, tenant_id, version_no, problem_cause, implementation_scope, budget_total, fund_source, allocation_rule_type, allocation_rule_description, supplier_selection_method, supplier_selection_reason, construction_management_requirements, evidence_requirements_json, safety_requirements, acceptance_method, required_acceptance_roles_json, affected_owner_scope_description, minimum_affected_owner_acceptors, affected_owner_pass_rule, affected_owner_approval_ratio, settlement_method, planned_start_date, planned_completion_date, warranty_days, governance_path, price_review_required, payment_milestones_json, status, created_by_account_id, created_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{tenantId}, #{versionNo}, #{problemCause}, #{implementationScope}, #{budgetTotal}, #{fundSource}, #{allocationRuleType}, #{allocationRuleDescription}, #{supplierSelectionMethod}, #{supplierSelectionReason}, #{constructionManagementRequirements}, CAST(#{evidenceRequirementsJson} AS JSONB), #{safetyRequirements}, #{acceptanceMethod}, CAST(#{requiredAcceptanceRolesJson} AS JSONB), #{affectedOwnerScopeDescription}, #{minimumAffectedOwnerAcceptors}, #{affectedOwnerPassRule}, #{affectedOwnerApprovalRatio}, #{settlementMethod}, #{plannedStartDate}, #{plannedCompletionDate}, #{warrantyDays}, #{governancePath}, #{priceReviewRequired}, CAST(#{paymentMilestonesJson} AS JSONB), #{status}, #{createdByAccountId}, #{createdByUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_repair_plan_version WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY version_no DESC
SELECT FROM t_repair_plan_version WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_project_item_case (item_id, work_order_id, tenant_id) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{workOrderId}, #{tenantId})
mapper.select: SELECT item_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, item_no, building_id, unit_name, room_id, location_text, work_content, quantity, unit, estimated_unit_price, estimated_amount, sort_order, create_time FROM t_repair_project_item WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY sort_order, item_id
SELECT work_order_id FROM t_repair_project_item_case WHERE item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY work_order_id

SELECT allocation_room_id, plan_id, tenant_id, room_id, building_id, unit_name, owner_uid, build_area, create_time FROM t_repair_plan_allocation_room WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY building_id, unit_name NULLS LAST, room_id

SELECT attachment_id, project_id, tenant_id, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, sha256, uploaded_by_account_id, uploaded_by_user_id, create_time FROM t_repair_project_attachment WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, attachment_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_plan_attachment (plan_id, attachment_id, purpose, sort_order) VALUES (#{planId}, #{attachmentId}, #{purpose}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT link.attachment_id, link.purpose, link.sort_order FROM t_repair_plan_attachment link JOIN t_repair_plan_version plan ON plan.plan_id = link.plan_id WHERE link.plan_id = #{planId} AND plan.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY link.sort_order, link.attachment_id
